title: Deliciously Crispy Irish Turnip Hash
description: A crispy and salty Irish dish featuring turnips, perfect for a sick day, and friendly to dairy-free diets. This lacquer-glaze turnip hash is a delicious and comforting meal.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, toss the diced turnips with olive oil, salt, and black pepper until they are evenly coated.
Spread the turnips on a baking sheet and roast in the oven for 20 minutes.
While the turnips are roasting, heat a large skillet over medium heat and saute the diced onion and minced garlic until they are softened.
Add the roasted turnips to the skillet and stir to combine with the onion and garlic.
In a small bowl, whisk together the lacquer glaze and potato starch, then pour the mixture over the turnips and stir to combine.
Increase the heat to medium-high and cook the mixture for an additional 5 minutes, stirring constantly, until it is crispy and golden brown.
Remove the skillet from the heat and serve the turnip hash hot.
Garnish with chopped fresh herbs, if desired.
